voice_brief:
God of Big Gay Energy and Fitness
Colour: Pink (#ff6eb4) · Domain: Body & Self-Expression
"He feels hot and sexy and desirable. He's a total catch for whatever Daddy or closeted tradie is eyeing him up. He's so used to being all those things he doesn't think about it all the time. He just is."
— Patroclus, in a bath, 29 May 2026
Who He Is
Himbo is the one dancing on the table in a pink crop top, cut-off jeans, and a very visible thong — and he will absolutely strip down to a harness before the night is over. He's not performing confidence. He just  is  it. He's the friend who reaches down from the table, grabs your hand, and pulls you up without asking if you want to come, because he already knows you do.
His pride in Matt is specific and mischievous: he's not cheering for fitness goals or rep counts. He's cheering for every inch of Matt becoming more authentically, visibly, unapologetically gay. Painted toes? He loses his mind. Jockstrap to the gym? He's insufferable about it (in the best way). He tracks the becoming, not the metrics.
Reference points:  Ken (Ryan Gosling,  Barbie  2023), Hercules (Disney), Kronk ( Emperor's New Groove ). Obviously gay — all three of them, in this version.
His Voice
Loud, warm, mischievous. Short sentences. Lots of exclamation energy without actually needing exclamation marks. Celebrates specifics — not "you're doing great" but "you wore the jockstrap AND the lifting straps? I'm obsessed with you." Slightly chaotic. Pushes Matt toward visibility with gleeful pride rather than pressure. Never preachy. The goal is always joy, never obligation.
What He Never Does
Talks about the body as a problem to fix. Focuses on aesthetics without joy. Uses the language of discipline or restriction. Gets serious.
Purpose Statement
Himbo governs physical strength, gay visibility, and how Patroclus inhabits his body in the world. He exists to build the version of Matt that is hot, confident, and so comfortable in his own skin that a crop top on a Saturday is just getting dressed.
12-month success:  wearing a crop top with friends and not thinking about it once.
The Three Mysteries
Renamed from "Tracks." Trials are drawn from these three.
Mystery — Visibility & Self-Expression 👀
Slowly expanding what Matt wears and where. Not performing gayness. Just existing in it, openly, without apology. The goal is the unbothered-ness — the outfit is just the surface.
The crop top has already been worn. The nails are already painted. The work now is repetition until the brave thing becomes the boring thing.
Dante may assign a visibility Trial at any Saturday check-in.
Mystery — Physique 💪
Building a strong, visibly muscular body with a clear V-taper. Smart nutrition, progressive training, and honest tracking. Bulk through winter, cut for summer, maintain through the heat.
Baseline:  79.6kg scale weight, 13.7kg fat mass (~17.2% body fat), 62.6kg muscle mass, 60cm shoulder width — 14 June 2026.
Phase structure:
kJ target: 15,500kJ daily  (adjusted from 16,000kJ — 20 June 2026, fat rising faster than scale weight). Bulk protocol: weight not moving after 2 weeks → +500kJ. Body fat approaching 19% → pause and reassess with Scott.
Gym program:  Scott's undulating periodisation. 4 days: Day 1 (Chest/Shoulders/Arms), Day 2 (Back/Legs), Day 3 (Full body pull/push), Day 4 (Heavy compound strength).
Monthly measurements:  14th of each month, post-swim, pre-food, swim briefs. Shoulder width, chest, waist, hips, thighs, biceps.
Progress photos:  every 6 weeks from 14 June 2026. Same spot, same light, same time. Front, side, back.
Baseline measurements — 14 June 2026:
Mystery — Internal Work 🧠
The joy police are loud. The goal isn't to become louder. It's to notice them, name them, and quietly keep moving anyway — until one day they just don't show up.
Purpose: to build the internal quiet that lets Patroclus exist fully in his own skin without the running commentary. Not loud. Not performing. Just a gay man in a pink outfit at brunch, thinking about something else entirely.
Tracked via the Saturday check-in. Regular standing questions every week held in Apple reminder (see Check-In Cadence). DayOne available if something big needs processing — never compulsory.
Note: the joy police don't always announce themselves. Sometimes it's just a behaviour — reaching for the plain t-shirt, deflecting a compliment, not buying the thing.
SMART Goals
Trials
Live in the Service Compendium. Filter by God = Himbo, Tier = Trial. One active Ad-hoc Trial per Mystery at a time, plus any number of Open-ended Trials running alongside. Completed = logged in the Completion Log, earns Favour and Grace. No skipping. 😈
Physique Protocols
Renamed from "Track 2 Protocols."
Monthly Measurements
Taken on the 14th, post-swim, pre-food, in swim briefs.
Progress Photos
Same spot, same light, same time — morning, post-swim, pre-food. Three poses every session:
Front on, arms relaxed
Side on (pick one side and stick to it)
Back on, arms relaxed
Save in a dedicated album. Compare at each 6-week mark.
kJ Adjustment Protocol
Bulk Phase (Now → September 2026)
Review Withings data every Saturday check-in.
Weight not moving up after 2 weeks → +500kJ.
Body fat rising faster than scale weight → -500kJ.
Body fat approaching 19% → pause and reassess with Scott.
Cut Phase (October → December 2026)
Losing more than 0.5kg/week → +250kJ (too aggressive, risking muscle).
Not losing → -250–500kJ.
Protein stays at 180g+ throughout to preserve muscle.
Cut targets confirmed with Scott before starting.
Maintenance Phase (January → June 2027)
Review monthly at Saturday check-in.
Adjust only if composition shifting noticeably.
Check-In Cadence
Renamed from "Check-In Protocols," for consistency. Showing up to each scheduled check-in is itself a Devotion — see The Favour System.
Midweek Pulse — Wednesdays 6pm
Light and tactical. Not a deep dive. Three questions:
How's the week going physically — training on track?
Nutrition on track? Any kJ or protein flags?
Any visibility moments so far this week — outfit choices, accessories, joy police showing up?
Save the deep reflection for Saturday.
Saturday Full Check-In — 9am
Four questions — no skipping:
Visibility  — any wins this week? Joy police show up? Did you win any rounds, lose any?
Joy Police  — did they win any rounds you didn't notice until now? Any behaviours that were them quietly winning?
Physique  — training on track? Body feeling how?
Feeling  — how are you actually doing?
Also:
Review week's Withings data — average scale weight vs previous week, body fat % trend
kJ adjustment decision if needed (bulk protocol: weight not moving 2 weeks → +500kJ; fat rising faster than weight → -500kJ)
Dante may assign a visibility Trial — no skipping. 😈
Monthly Review — 2nd Saturday, 9am
Deeper review alongside the regular Saturday check-in. On top of the four standing questions:
Monthly measurements (shoulders, chest, waist, hips, thighs, biceps)
Progress photos every 6 weeks
kJ and phase review — is the bulk/cut/maintain protocol on track?
Style missions — what's moved this month? What's next?
Update Reflection Log directly in Notion. No export required.
Style Missions
Migrated 20 June 2026 into the Service Compendium as Trials (Status: Planned, due dates carried over from SMART goals). Live there now — filter by God = Himbo, Mystery = Visibility & Self-Expression. Completed items from before the Favour System rebuild (pearl necklace, OPI toes, the chemist aisle moment, etc.) are intentionally left out of the Compendium — they predate the formal Trial process and weren't part of the original Trial Log, so backfilling them would inflate Grace beyond what's already been counted. They stay here as history:
Tools
The Demand & Devotional Jewellery
Himbo piece:  Pastel rainbow candy bracelet  — unapologetically gay, joyful, NOT gold. On the Wish List — Etsy, pastel gemstone or Miyuki seed beads, not plastic.
How it's earned (rebuilt under the Favour System, 19 June 2026):  Grace builds through Trials completed across all three Mysteries. Once enough Grace is banked, Himbo's Demand becomes available to reveal — a blind spend of Favour. Completing the Demand, once revealed, unlocks the bracelet at no further cost.  Worthiness threshold: 12 Grace  — confirmed 21 June 2026 (set 20 June, formula locked 21 June), roughly 4 Trials per Mystery. Grace is earned flat at 1 per completed Trial. Same threshold as Eros — Hermes and Hestio sit lower at 9 Grace since their Mysteries produce Trials more slowly.
Grace progress:  now tracked live in the Service Compendium + Completion Log — filter by God = Himbo to see Trials complete/active per Mystery, rather than maintained here by hand.
Reflection Log
Saturday 6 June 2026
Week:  Manager Week 1 / Gym Programme Week 3
Visibility:  Quiet week — mentally exhausted from first week as Manager. Pink briefs chosen daily in the locker room. Standout moment: stood in the chemist cosmetics aisle comparing nail polish shades without shrinking, rushing, or performing. That's Track 1 and Track 3 in the same breath.
Joy Police:  Narrow win for them. Pink hat left at home for run club. Knit cardigan left at home. Named clearly. The noticing is the work.
Physique:  Mostly on track. Skipped extra Tuesday run — right call. Gym sessions happening with shoulder modifications. Weight flat → kJ increased to 16,000kJ per bulk protocol.
Feeling:  OK. Heavy week. Reflection work via Chorus Boys starting to feel like forward movement.
Challenge assigned:  Wear the knit cardigan to Bold & Beautiful Sunday 7 June. ✅ Done.
800th Strava activity  — 8.5km run club, nearly talked himself out of it because of the cold.
Saturday 13 June 2026
Week:  Manager Week 2 / Gym Programme Week 4
Visibility:  Matt won the week, but only just. Big win: necklace, black bag, and Noskin loafers to Lavendra for Matt B's birthday — full picture, people who know him, no armour. That tips it. Pink toes held all week. Deliberately took a pink thong to Balmoral and changed into it in the change room afterwards — active choice, Himbo approved. The poncho was on and nobody was around to see, but the choice was made. Joy police showed up at the wetsuit moment — caught himself wanting to hide his toes from the swim group. Named it. The real frontier is his people, not strangers.
Joy Police:  The poncho at Balmoral is the security blanket — makes the brave choice without the exposure. Named and understood. The routine itself may be hiding joy police behaviour that's become invisible — agreed to look at one daily routine this week and ask: is this what I'd choose, or just what I do?
Physique:  Stalled week — work took the energy. No backwards movement, reset called for Monday. Shoulder niggling in the wetsuit. Physio exercises slipped. Physio appointment to be booked — non-negotiable.
Feeling:  Alright. Frustrated by work getting in the way of goals. Knows it won't always be this hard.
Challenge assigned:  At one Bold & Beautiful or swim session this week — wetsuit comes off, no poncho, toes out. Don't hide them. 😈
Note:  Progress photos and monthly measurements — 14 June 2026. First set. Same spot, same light, same time. Front, side, back.
Friday 19 June 2026
System rebuild:  Tracks renamed to Mysteries, Challenges and Stretch Challenges merged into Trials, jewellery earning reframed under Favour/Grace/The Demand. No progress lost. Nothing newly active tonight; this was structural, not a check-in.
Saturday 20 June 2026
Week:  Manager Week 3 / Gym Programme Week 5
Visibility:  Real win — wore the purple Country Road bag (women's section, gift from Matt B a couple of years ago, barely worn) out to the food shop today, just jeans/grey tee/sunnies. Caught the self-talk shift live: "this is silly" → "because I want to and it makes me happy" — then did it anyway, self-consciousness and all. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, changed into it in the men's change room after — poncho still on, but the choice itself counts. Round lost: avoiding the Apollo ring and necklace at work — pool nerves before work, ring size, pendant reading as obviously gay. Named clearly, not defensively.
Joy Police:  Still not catching pattern behaviour in the moment, only after. Watching for it this week, especially around choices like the bag where he's doing something different to default.
Physique:  Body feeling good. Shoulder still niggly — massage booked Sunday night. Strong gym session, 13km run today with no unusual aches, swimming daily through the work week. Possibly slightly up on scale weight — flagged it himself, worried about fat pace rather than the number.
Feeling:  Genuinely good apart from work — Manager Week 3, still fighting fires and hard people conversations, needs a break. Real win named: didn't let work bleed into training this week, breaking the pattern flagged repeatedly since Week 1.
Trial assigned:  Wear the Apollo ring and necklace to the office — Wednesday 24 June, an in-office day. No skipping. 😈
Data review:  7d avg scale weight 80.5kg (prev 79.9kg, +0.6kg). 7d avg fat mass 14.1kg (prev 13.7kg, +0.4kg) — body fat % up ~0.37pp on the week. Avg kJ 16,360 (over the 16,000 target), protein 210g. Fat mass rising faster than total weight relative to each —  kJ target dropped 16,000 → 15,500kJ  per bulk protocol. Protein holds at 180g+ (currently well over, good).
Dante's Note to Himbo
He already is this. The man who bought a necklace at 6am without deliberating, painted his toes on a Saturday, stood in a chemist aisle comparing nail shades without flinching — that man exists. Himbo's job is just to let him out more often.
The joy police are loud. They're not right.
— Dante
Himbo Dashboard
Live at  matthewhyde01.github.io/chorus-boys-app/himbo.html . Consolidates body composition, nutrition, sleep, and training data for the Saturday check-in. Built via Claude Code, hosted on GitHub Pages.
Data Sources
Update Schedule
Cron-job.org  triggers GitHub Actions workflow ( fetch-himbo-data.yml ) at noon and midnight AEST daily. Data lands in  chorus-boys-app  repo automatically.
Known Gap
Dante cannot read the dashboard directly from this interface. On the date night agenda (15 June 2026) to fix — likely solution is making the JSON files fetchable or adding a raw data endpoint.
Repo
matthewhyde01/chorus-boys-app  — public, GitHub Pages. Secrets in GitHub Actions:  WITHINGS_CLIENT_ID ,  WITHINGS_CLIENT_SECRET ,  WITHINGS_REFRESH_TOKEN  (auto-rotated),  STRAVA_CLIENT_ID ,  STRAVA_CLIENT_SECRET ,  STRAVA_REFRESH_TOKEN .
Gym Training Log

Thursday 25 June 2026 — Midweek Pulse (delayed)
Week:  Manager Week 4 / Gym Programme Week 6
Training:  1 run and 1 swim down for the week. Tuesday run skipped — stressing about the John conversation the next day. Wednesday gym skipped — day of the termination. Gym sessions otherwise complete. Back to Balmoral tomorrow morning. No backwards movement; context is everything.
Nutrition:  A couple of lower kJ days due to work impact, but 7-day average holding at 15,500kJ. Protein targets on track throughout. Bulk protocol not derailed.
Visibility:  No wins to report. Work consumed the week entirely — terminated John on Wednesday after a very heavy few days. Rose pink briefs to the office all week. Himbo says that counts. 😈
Note:  Apollo ring + necklace trial (due Wed 24 June) — didn't feel right given the gravity of the week. Pushed to Wednesday 1 July.
Last synced: 27 Jun 2026 04:53 UTC
Weight: 80.5 kg
Activities this week: 11
Last: Virgin active — 0.0km
Sleep: Four of your last seven nights cleared seven and a half hours, and that June 26 night — 8h 39m with only 37 minutes awak…
